data.title: Sling Aircraft North America Partners with Tango Flight to Deliver Sling 2 Aircraft Kits to High Schools Nationwide
data.description: In Torrance, California on March 5, 2026, Tango Flight revealed a recent collaboration with Sling Aircraft North America. Through this partnership, they aim to supply Sling 2 kit aircraft to numerous high schools throughout the United States. This initiative is set to enhance aviation education for students by offering more hands-on opportunities. The objective behind this collaboration is to bolster practical learning experiences and promote the advancement of aviation education among youth.

Wind power has a long past and a huge future. But how do we build it? CGTN’s Wang Tianyu traveled 80 km off China’s eastern coast to visit an offshore wind farm and see how energy is harvested from the sea.

data.title: Facephi and Huenei Forge Strategic Alliance to Strengthen Digital Identity Solutions in Latin America and the United States
data.description: Facephi and Huenei have recently announced a strategic partnership to enhance digital identity solutions in Latin America and the United States. The collaboration aims to capitalize on the growing demand for secure identity verification services in these regions. With Facephi's cutting-edge technology and Huenei's extensive experience in the industry, the alliance is set to offer innovative solutions to cater to the increasing market needs. Through this partnership, both companies intend to leverage their expertise to provide advanced digital identity solutions and strengthen their presence in the Latin American and US markets. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards enhancing security and efficiency in digital identification processes in these regions.

data.title: Bitcoin Is Not 'Structurally Flawed'—But Gold Is, Bitwise's Matt Hougan Says
data.description: Bitwise's Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan countered billionaire Chamath Palihapitiya's statement that Bitcoin is structurally flawed by highlighting that this criticism is more applicable to gold. Hougan disagreed with Palihapitiya's assertion that Bitcoin is not suitable for central bank reserves, emphasizing the logistical challenges and security risks associated with storing or transporting physical gold. Hougan argued that central banks prefer assets like Bitcoin that can be digitally transferred globally, as opposed to relying on physical assets like gold.

data.title: OneShield Expands AI Hub Platform with Specialty Insurance Provider, Reinforcing AI-Native Strategy for the Insurance Industry
data.description: A tech solutions provider for property and casualty insurance, OneShield, revealed that a specialized insurance firm in Michigan has opted for their AI Hub platform to enhance their insurance operations. The platform, designed explicitly for the insurance sector, offers cutting-edge large language models and agentic capabilities to insurers. This development underscores the continuous evolution towards advanced technologies in the insurance industry and highlights the growing demand for AI-driven solutions.

data.title: Luma Launches Luma Agents Powered by Unified Intelligence for Creative Work
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Luma has introduced Luma Agents, a groundbreaking class of AI collaborators proficient in handling comprehensive creative tasks involving text, image, video, and audio.

data.title: AAON Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on March 5, 2026, AAON, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAON) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved the upcoming regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share ($0.40 annually). The payment is set to be distributed on March 30, 2026, to stockholders of the Company.
